creator: coco@executive-computing.de
text:
Created attachment 145728
gatling-0.13-stage.patch

- Take maintainership
- Stage
- Fix some gcc warnings
- Add LICENSE
- Define OPTIONS for DOC, EXAMPLES and DEBUG
- Silence pre-install and do-install

coco@x2q:~/redports/coco/www/gatling % portlint .
WARN: Makefile: only one MASTER_SITE configured.  Consider adding additional mirrors.
0 fatal errors and 1 warning found.
coco@x2q:~/redports/coco/www/gatling %
